topic: Ghana 1-0 Panama: Caleb Yirenkyi's 95th-minute winner gives Ghana three points in Group L at BMO Field, Toronto
subject: ghana

hook.spoken_hook: Ninety-four minutes. Still nil-nil. Then came the ninety-fifth.

scenes.voiceover: Ninety-four minutes. Still nil-nil. Then came the ninety-fifth.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black and gold gradient, rain-streaked effect, bold white condensed '94TH MINUTE' and '0-0' in gold, shadowy stadium floodlights piercing darkness, vertical 9:16, cinematic tension.

scenes.voiceover: Partey denied entry. In stepped a twenty-year-old debutant.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Premium black-and-gold player profile card, 'CALEB YIRENKYI' in bold condensed white, '20 years old' in gold below, Ghana #3 kit silhouette on the right, clean broadcast style stat card, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Keeper went down twice. Panama kept knocking. Looked headed for a stalemate.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background with motion blur effect, gold '0-0' faded in the background, Ghana kit silhouette in a defensive stance, rain texture overlay, tension-filled broadcast frame, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Ninety-fifth minute. Thomas-Asante burst through. Square ball. Yirenkyi slotted it. Stadium erupted.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Explosive gold confetti burst on deep black, bold gold '95' glowing big in the center, 'GHANA 1-0' in white bold condensed below, silhouetted arms-raised celebration figure, vertical 9:16, climactic energy.

scenes.voiceover: Carlos Queiroz, seventy-three, sprinted to celebrate with Ghana's fans.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Cinematic black background, gold motion trail suggesting a sprint across frame, silhouette of an older man in a suit and tie, Ghana flag colors in the background texture, emotional broadcast finish, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Subscribe for daily World Cup. Ghana second in Group L.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Clean black-and-gold ranked group-standings table, white condensed type, flag icons and 3-letter codes, Ghana row highlighted in glowing gold, vertical 9:16 broadcast graphic.

comment_bait: England next for Ghana. Croatia chasing. Can Ghana top Group L? Make your call.
cta: Follow for a World Cup story every single day
music_mood: cinematic tension building through rain and drums, rising to an explosive triumphant release on the goal, settling into a confident piano outro

thumbnail.concept: Ghana Black Stars crest on deep black background, bold gold '95TH' and 'WINNER' in white condensed stacked below, gold confetti texture, premium broadcast thumbnail style, vertical 9:16.

youtube_title: Ghana 1-0 Panama | 95th-Minute Winner! Yirenkyi | World Cup 2026 Group L
youtube_description: Ghana 1-0 Panama — Caleb Yirenkyi's 95th-minute stoppage-time winner gives the Black Stars three points in Group L at BMO Field, Toronto. England also beat Croatia 4-2, so Group L is wide open. Ghana's manager Carlos Queiroz (73) sprinted the pitch to celebrate. Thomas Partey was denied entry. A 20-year-old debutant delivered. Subscribe for a World Cup story every day. #WorldCup2026 #Ghana #Panama
instagram_caption: 94 minutes of nothing. Then the 95th changed everything 🇬🇭 Ghana 1-0 Panama on a Caleb Yirenkyi stoppage-time winner. A 20-year-old debutant. An injured keeper. A 73-year-old manager sprinting the pitch. Group L is wide open — England next. Can Ghana top the group? Make your call — I'll be in the replies 👇 Follow @tikitakafootytv for a World Cup story every day.
